entities.name: Two-Layer Email Structure
entities.context: Framework for structuring warm introduction emails with separate layers for introducer and end recipient

entities.name: Cover Note (Layer 1)
entities.context: First layer of warm intro email addressed TO the introducer/mutual acquaintance

entities.name: Forwardable Content (Layer 2)
entities.context: Second layer designed for the introducer to pass along to the end recipient

entities.name: Warm Introductions
entities.context: Networking practice of being introduced through mutual connections

relationships.context: Framework specifically designed to facilitate warm introductions
First component of the two-layer structure
Second component of the two-layer structure
